description: ⚠️ WRITE OPERATION - Confirm with user before calling. Updates information for an existing group-level [logging service](/docs/logs/external-logs) within your Fivetran account.

parameters.name: logId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the log service within the Fivetran system.

enabled.description: The boolean value specifying whether the log service is enabled.

run_setup_tests.description: When `true`, Fivetran runs setup tests immediately after creating or updating the log service and returns the results in the `setup_tests` field of the response. Defaults to `false`.
